hooks.template: (insert item) (insert fact), (insert complete opposite item) (insert similar fact).
hooks.text: Same currency, two prices today. One business owner pays more, the next pays less.

hooks.template: If you don't have (insert item/action), do (insert item/action).
hooks.text: If a business owner pays suppliers on a personal rate, switch to the business rate.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A business owner checked his supplier wire and noticed something strange in the rate.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: One business owner saved 300 dollars per supplier wire without changing anything but the rate.

hooks.template: (insert big brand) didn't want to sponsor this video, let me show you what they're missing out on.
hooks.text: His bank never told him there were two rates. Watch what they hid.
